4d-projection-dream-weavers.name: 4D Projection Dream Weavers
4d-projection-dream-weavers.reason: A continuous slice through 4-dimensional fractal space. The mouse smoothly controls two extra dimensions, allowing genuine exploration of higher-dimensional forms. Audio modulates scale, speed, and detail.

acoustic-string-theory.name: Acoustic String Theory
acoustic-string-theory.reason: Vibrating string harmonics visualized as oscillating sine waves in perspective, with audio-driven pluck and resonance.

aero-chromatics-prismatic.name: Aero Chromatics Prismatic
aero-chromatics-prismatic.reason: Wind-driven chromatic smoke trails enhanced with physical prismatic dispersion via Cauchy's equation. Each wavelength refracts at a different angle through a virtual lens, creating rainbow edge effects on advected smoke.

aerogel-smoke-hdr.name: Aerogel Smoke HDR
aerogel-smoke-hdr.reason: Ethereal aerogel volumetric smoke with HDR bloom enhancement. Silica nanoparticle scattering combines with an HDR bloom kernel that amplifies overbright regions, creating luminous glow around dense scattering zones.

alpha-aurora-bands.name: Alpha Aurora Bands
alpha-aurora-bands.reason: Physically-motivated aurora borealis simulation with emission-line spectral decomposition. RGB stores oxygen green, oxygen red, and nitrogen blue emission intensities. Alpha tracks altitude layer index. Mouse controls solar wind direction; ripples trigger magnetic reconnection substorms.

alpha-crystal-growth-phase.name: Alpha Crystal Growth Phase
alpha-crystal-growth-phase.reason: Phase-field model of crystal growth with RGBA-packed state. Phase (solid/liquid), temperature, crystal orientation, and impurity concentration evolve together. Creates dendritic crystal patterns with orientation-dependent color. Mouse seeds new crystals; ripples trigger nucleation.

alpha-depth-fog-volumetric.name: Alpha Depth Fog Volumetric
alpha-depth-fog-volumetric.reason: Physically-motivated volumetric fog using depth texture. Alpha stores optical depth / transmittance via Beer-Lambert law. Fog density varies with 3D noise, depth, and height. Mouse clears local fog; ripples create swirling disturbances.

alpha-em-field-simulation.name: Alpha EM Field Simulation
alpha-em-field-simulation.reason: Electromagnetic field simulation using RGBA32FLOAT as four data channels: R=E-field X, G=E-field Y, B=magnetic potential, A=charge density. Mouse and ripples inject alternating positive/negative charges. Wave equation propagation with damping.

alpha-erosion-terrain.name: Alpha Erosion Terrain
alpha-erosion-terrain.reason: Hydraulic erosion simulation with RGBA-packed terrain state. Height from image luminance is eroded by flowing water that picks up sediment and deposits it in flat areas. Mouse creates rainstorms; ripples trigger flash floods. Alpha tracks cumulative erosion history.

alpha-fire-temperature.name: Alpha Fire Temperature
alpha-fire-temperature.reason: Fire simulation with RGBA-packed state: fuel, temperature, smoke density, and combustion age. Temperature drives blackbody radiation color. Fuel burns, generates smoke, and heat rises via convection. Mouse injects fuel; ripples create sparks.

alpha-fluid-simulation-paint.name: Alpha Fluid Simulation Paint
alpha-fluid-simulation-paint.reason: Full 2D incompressible fluid simulation packed into a single RGBA32FLOAT texture. R=velocity.x, G=velocity.y, B=pressure, A=dye density. Mouse creates vortices and injects dye. Requires f32 for signed velocity and pressure fields.

alpha-hdr-bloom-chain.name: Alpha HDR Bloom Chain
alpha-hdr-bloom-chain.reason: HDR bloom effect where alpha stores exposure/overexposure value. Identifies pixels above white point, radially blurs the excess brightness, and composites with ACES tone mapping. Mouse and ripples trigger localized flashes.

alpha-luminance-history.name: Alpha Luminance History
alpha-luminance-history.reason: Temporal luminance history with rolling average stored in alpha. Areas that were recently bright retain a warm glow. Creates light-painting and after-image effects. Mouse leaves persistent bright trails.

alpha-multi-layer-glass.name: Alpha Multi-Layer Glass
alpha-multi-layer-glass.reason: Multi-layer glass refraction with RGBA data channels. Simulates looking through 3 layers of procedurally-distorted glass with Fresnel reflection, chromatic aberration, and per-layer tinting. Alpha stores accumulated transmittance.

alpha-multi-state-ecosystem.name: Alpha Multi-State Ecosystem
alpha-multi-state-ecosystem.reason: Continuous multi-species ecosystem simulation packed into RGBA32FLOAT. Two species compete for shared resources while producing toxins. Species diffuse, grow, compete, and die. Mouse nurtures by adding resources.

alpha-paint-thickness.name: Alpha Paint Thickness
alpha-paint-thickness.reason: Impasto paint thickness simulation where alpha tracks paint depth. Thin paint creates transparent washes, medium shows full color, thick paint catches specular highlights and casts micro-shadows. Mouse paints with color-cycling brush; ripples create splatters.

alpha-reaction-diffusion-rgba.name: Alpha Reaction Diffusion RGBA
alpha-reaction-diffusion-rgba.reason: Four-species reaction-diffusion simulation packed into RGBA32FLOAT. A feeds B, C feeds D, with cross-inhibition between pairs. Creates complex multi-color patterns impossible in 2-species systems.

alpha-spectral-decompose.name: Alpha Spectral Decompose
alpha-spectral-decompose.reason: Decomposes the image into 4 spectral frequency bands stored in RGBA. Low freq (R), mid-low (G), mid-high (B), high freq/detail (A). Recomposes with user-controlled per-band gain for frequency-equalizer style image manipulation.

alpha-watercolor-wetness.name: Alpha Watercolor Wetness
alpha-watercolor-wetness.reason: Watercolor simulation with wetness map in alpha. Pigment flows with water gradients via capillary action. Wet areas allow bleeding; dry areas lock pigment. Mouse drops colored water; ripples add water drops. Authentic dark-edge effects at wet boundaries.

alucinate-hdr.name: Alucinate HDR
alucinate-hdr.reason: When Alucinate (AI VJ) mode is active, this serves as a visual 'conductor's baton' — elegant, minimal music-reactive glyphs and a living spectrogram that represent the current vibe stack. The psychedelic warp + HDR bloom provides a rich atmospheric underlayer. Mouse acts as the conductor's hand.

ambient-liquid-coupled.name: Ambient Liquid Coupled
ambient-liquid-coupled.reason: Two viscous liquid layers coupled through a living membrane. Mouse presses like a finger into the surface, creating tears that slowly heal. Bass increases surface tension, making deformations more dramatic and persistent.

anaglyph-3d.name: Anaglyph 3D
anaglyph-3d.reason: Red-cyan stereoscopic anaglyph with temporal ghost fringing persistence, chromatic separation enhancement per depth, mouse focal depth curve refinement, and bass-pulsed split width.

analog-film-degrade.name: Analog Film Degrade
analog-film-degrade.reason: Vintage film degradation with grain, dust, scratches, color fading, and vignette.

anamorphic-caustic-flare.name: Anamorphic Caustic Flare
anamorphic-caustic-flare.reason: Premium cinematic anamorphic lens flares combined with living, refracting water caustics that distort and project the source footage. Bass stretches the flares dramatically while treble animates the caustic ripples. Mouse tilts the virtual lens.

anisotropic-kuwahara-nlm.name: Anisotropic Kuwahara + NLM
anisotropic-kuwahara-nlm.reason: Painterly anisotropic Kuwahara filter enhanced with Non-Local Means patch-similarity denoising. Structure tensor guides brush stroke direction while NLM preserves edges and creates an importance map.

ascii-flow-structure.name: ASCII Flow + Structure Tensor
ascii-flow-structure.reason: ASCII glyph rendering driven by structure tensor flow field. Glyphs align with image edges and orientations instead of random noise. Line Integral Convolution modulates brightness.

astral-kaleidoscope-morph.name: Astral Kaleidoscope + Morphological
astral-kaleidoscope-morph.reason: Psychedelic kaleidoscope with chromatic separation enhanced by morphological erosion/dilation operations. Morphological gradient creates glowing halos around segments, top-hat transform isolates bright sparkles.

atmos-fog-volumetric.name: Atmospheric Fog Volumetric
atmos-fog-volumetric.reason: Enhanced volumetric fog combining physical transmittance with interactive depth-layered alpha. Mouse clears fog locally, ripples create swirling disturbances, and height-based density mixes with Beer's Law for atmospheric realism.

audio-reactive-pyramid.name: Audio Reactive Pyramid
audio-reactive-pyramid.reason: Three-level Laplacian-style sharpening pyramid whose band intensities are driven by matching FFT frequency bands: coarse detail by bass bins (0–12), mid detail by mid bins (13–50), fine detail by treble bins (51–127). Compatible with the ford442/flac_player FFT wire format (128 bins in extraBuffer[5..132]).

audio-reactive-rgb-dispersion.name: Audio Reactive RGB Dispersion
audio-reactive-rgb-dispersion.reason: Chromatic (RGB) dispersion effect whose offset magnitudes and direction are driven by the spectral centroid of the live 128-bin FFT array. Bass-heavy music produces tight warm dispersion; treble-heavy music produces wide cool dispersion. Compatible with ford442/flac_player FFT wire format (128 bins in extraBuffer[5..132]).

audio-reactive-temporal-decay.name: Audio Reactive Temporal Decay
audio-reactive-temporal-decay.reason: Feedback trail effect whose per-pixel decay rate is modulated by the energy of a selectable FFT frequency bin range. Low-band energy → long ghostly trails; high-band energy → fast fade. Compatible with the ford442/flac_player FFT wire format (128 bins in extraBuffer[5..132]).

audio-voronoi-displacement.name: Audio Voronoi Displacement
audio-voronoi-displacement.reason: Audio-reactive Voronoi cells that displace the image. Image fractured into cells that pulse with music.

audio-voronoi-gabor.name: Audio Voronoi Gabor
audio-voronoi-gabor.reason: Audio-reactive Voronoi displacement modulated by Gabor texture analysis. Gabor filter banks detect local texture orientation and strength, rotating and scaling cell displacement. Edges and textured regions displace differently than smooth areas.

aurora-borealis-iridescence.name: Aurora Borealis Iridescence
aurora-borealis-iridescence.reason: Northern lights with flowing ribbon curves enhanced by thin-film iridescence. Each aurora ribbon shimmers with soap-bubble and oil-slick interference colors driven by ribbon intensity and animated turbulence.

aurora-borealis-loom.name: Aurora Borealis Loom
aurora-borealis-loom.reason: Aurora curtains woven like fabric on a celestial loom. Threads of light interlace with weft and warp patterns. Bass swells the weave, mids shift hue through the spectrum, treble adds bead-like ionization nodes. Mouse pulls the fabric.

aurora-curtain.name: Aurora Curtain
aurora-curtain.reason: Chapman layer auroral excitation with Kelvin-Helmholtz instability along curtain edges. Physically accurate colors by altitude: red O(1D) high, green O(1S) mid, blue N2+ low. Rayleigh scattering, starfield, and HDR bloom. Audio drives geomagnetic storm intensity. Mouse drags magnetic zenith. Depth controls extinction.

aurora-rift-2-iridescence.name: Aurora Rift 2 Iridescence
aurora-rift-2-iridescence.reason: Iridescent aurora curtains combining volumetric aurora simulation with thin-film interference. Each aurora layer gets soap-bubble/oil-slick coloring from optical path difference. Optical depth modulates film thickness; viewing angle drives color shift. Beer's Law transmittance composites physically.

aurora-rift-2-pass1.name: Aurora Rift 2 (Pass 1: Enhanced Volumetric)
aurora-rift-2-pass1.reason: Enhanced volumetric aurora with improved flow dynamics. First pass of 2-pass system.

aurora-rift-2-pass2.name: Aurora Rift 2 (Pass 2: Enhanced Scattering)
aurora-rift-2-pass2.reason: Enhanced atmospheric scattering with richer color grading. Second pass of 2-pass system.

aurora-rift-iridescence.name: Aurora Rift Iridescence
aurora-rift-iridescence.reason: Atmospheric curl-flow aurora blended with thin-film interference. Pattern density drives soap-bubble and oil-slick film thickness, producing flowing iridescence that rides the aurora's organic motion.

aurora-rift-pass1.name: Aurora Rift (Pass 1: Volumetric)
aurora-rift-pass1.reason: Raymarches volumetric aurora with curl-driven flow. First pass of 2-pass system.

aurora-rift-pass2.name: Aurora Rift (Pass 2: Atmospheric Scattering)
aurora-rift-pass2.reason: Atmospheric scattering, color grading, and tone mapping. Second pass of 2-pass system.

bio-lenia-rgba.name: Bio Lenia RGBA
bio-lenia-rgba.reason: Four-species continuous cellular automata with Lenia-style smooth growth functions applied to each RGBA channel. Combines reaction-diffusion chemistry with biological emergence patterns. Cross-inhibition between species pairs creates complex multi-color morphologies.

bio-touch-em.name: Bio Touch EM
bio-touch-em.reason: Bio-luminescent cellular structures distorted by electromagnetic field lines. Magnetic field rotates cell glow colors. Click ripples spawn orbiting secondary charges.

bioluminescent-blackbody.name: Bioluminescent Blackbody
bioluminescent-blackbody.reason: Living organic growth patterns with physically-correct thermal coloring. Growth energy maps to blackbody temperature — cooler regions glow deep red, active growth burns orange-yellow, and intense hotspots reach white-hot temperatures.

bioluminescent-bloom.name: Bioluminescent Bloom
bioluminescent-bloom.reason: Deep-ocean bioluminescent colony driven by Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion with chemotaxis and quorum-sensing glow activation. Background tendrils provide ambient light. Audio injects nutrients and triggers stress flashes; mouse drops nutrient pellets. Depth attenuates bioluminescence.

black-hole-iridescence.name: Black Hole Iridescence
black-hole-iridescence.reason: Gravitational lensing black hole with iridescent accretion disk. The warped background and glowing disk receive thin-film interference coloring based on viewing angle, producing soap-bubble chromatic effects around the event horizon.

block-distort-em.name: Block Distort EM
block-distort-em.reason: Grid blocks pushed by mouse proximity, distorted by electromagnetic field lines. Electric field displaces UVs, magnetic field rotates hue. Click ripples spawn orbiting secondary charges.

blueprint-reveal-guided.name: Blueprint Reveal + Guided Filter
blueprint-reveal-guided.reason: Blueprint effect with depth-guided edge-aware filtering. The guided filter smooths the image using depth as guide before Sobel edge detection, creating blueprint lines that respect true object boundaries.

boids-rgba-ecosystem.name: Boids RGBA Ecosystem
boids-rgba-ecosystem.reason: Boids-inspired flow-field flocking combined with continuous multi-species ecosystem simulation. RGBA channels store species densities that advect, flock, and compete. Species 1 (flockers) and Species 2 (predators) consume resources, produce toxins, and exhibit emergent flocking behavior through neighborhood vector fields.

bubble-lens-coupled.name: Bubble Lens Coupled
bubble-lens-coupled.reason: Magnifying bubble lens warped by fluid dynamics. Mouse movement drags viscous fluid that distorts the lens boundary and creates vortices inside. Click ripples create fluid bursts.

byte-mosh-explosion.name: Byte Mosh Explosion
byte-mosh-explosion.reason: Bitwise pixel corruption meets chromatic prism explosion. XOR, AND, shift and rotate operations are applied to spectrally displaced channels radiating from mouse and ripple shockwaves.

cellular-automata-3d.name: Cellular Automata 3D
cellular-automata-3d.reason: 3D Game of Life rendered with volume raymarching. Glowing 3D structures that evolve frame-by-frame.

cellular-automata-rgba.name: Cellular Automata RGBA
cellular-automata-rgba.reason: 2D ecosystem cellular automaton with four interacting species packed into RGBA. Plants grow from nutrients, herbivores eat plants, predators eat herbivores, and all dead matter cycles back to soil nutrients. Continuous densities enable stable predator-prey oscillations.

charcoal-rub-diffusion.name: Charcoal Rub + Anisotropic Diffusion
charcoal-rub-diffusion.reason: Physical charcoal media simulation with Perona-Malik anisotropic diffusion preprocessing. Diffusion creates smooth tonal regions before charcoal conversion, with diffusion coefficient modulating charcoal density.

chromatic-focus-coupled.name: Chromatic Focus Coupled
chromatic-focus-coupled.reason: Chromatic aberration DOF with fluid-coupled distortion. Mouse movement stirs a viscous fluid that twists and blurs chromatic channels. Click ripples inject fluid bursts.

chromatic-ghost-tunnel.name: Chromatic Ghost Tunnel
chromatic-ghost-tunnel.reason: A perspective tunnel of chromatic ghost echoes. Each ring is RGB-split by audio bands. Bass warps tunnel depth, mids add spiral rotation, treble creates stroboscopic ring flashes. Mouse steers tunnel flight.

chromatic-reaction-diffusion.name: Chromatic Reaction-Diffusion
chromatic-reaction-diffusion.reason: Multi-channel Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion with chromatic separation. Each RGB channel has separate feed/kill rates.

chromatic-reaction-diffusion-rgba.name: Chromatic Reaction Diffusion RGBA
chromatic-reaction-diffusion-rgba.reason: Four-species reaction-diffusion with chromatic cross-coupling. Activators A/C and inhibitors B/D form warm/cool tone pairs that suppress each other at boundaries, creating iridescent fringe patterns. RGBA packs full simulation state.

chrono-luma-slit-scan.name: Chrono Luma Slit Scan
chrono-luma-slit-scan.reason: Luminance-driven 3D-texture slit scan: each pixel's brightness determines which frame in the history ring it samples. Bright pixels snap to the present; dark pixels reveal the deep past. Moving subjects leave temporal halos as their bright edges exist in the now while dark backgrounds drift through time.

chrono-voronoi-mycelium.name: Chrono-Voronoi Mycelium
chrono-voronoi-mycelium.reason: A living fungal network that grows across multiple time scales. Different generations of mycelium coexist as translucent layers. Mouse seeds new growth while audio seasons control the balance between expansion and decay. Now with chromatic dispersion and enhanced temporal feedback.

cinematic-flare.name: Cinematic Flare
cinematic-flare.reason: Physically-based lens flare with Cooke triplet ghost reflections, 6-blade diffraction starburst, scatter halo, anamorphic streaks, rainbow chromatic aberration, ACES tone mapping, and film grain. Mouse positions light source.

circuit-breaker-explosion.name: Circuit Breaker Explosion
circuit-breaker-explosion.reason: Circuit board edges chromatically separated near the mouse prism. Overload flashes become spectral rainbows. Click ripples launch chromatic shockwaves through the circuit pattern.

cmyk-halftone-explosion.name: CMYK Halftone Explosion
cmyk-halftone-explosion.reason: CMYK halftone dots spectrally separated near the mouse via prism displacement. Click ripples launch chromatic shockwaves through the halftone pattern.

color-channel-weave.name: Color Channel Weave
color-channel-weave.reason: Samples RGB channels from offset positions simulating a woven fabric. Horizontal threads carry red; vertical threads carry blue; green is neutral. Audio shifts thread spacing and chromatic offset. Mouse tilts the warp direction.

conv-anisotropic-diffusion.name: Anisotropic Diffusion
conv-anisotropic-diffusion.reason: Perona-Malik anisotropic diffusion that smooths along edges but not across them. Creates oil-painting simplification into flat colored regions. Alpha stores per-pixel diffusion coefficient as a process map. Mouse acts as heat source accelerating diffusion.

conv-bilateral-dream.name: Bilateral Dream
conv-bilateral-dream.reason: Edge-preserving bilateral smoothing with psychedelic color preservation. Uses RGBA32FLOAT alpha channel to store accumulated weight for deferred normalization. Mouse controls varying sharpness region.

conv-bilateral-grid-splat.name: Bilateral Grid Splat
conv-bilateral-grid-splat.reason: Fast approximate bilateral filter using 3D grid splatting (spatial x, y + intensity). Achieves edge-preserving smoothing at O(1) per pixel. RGBA32FLOAT stores HDR accumulated color and weight. Mouse creates high-resolution detail zone.

conv-difference-of-gaussians-cascade.name: Difference of Gaussians Cascade
conv-difference-of-gaussians-cascade.reason: Multi-scale Difference-of-Gaussians at 4 scales with signed response storage. Creates neural-edge glow where edges at different scales colorize differently. RGBA32FLOAT stores signed bipolar responses in all channels. Mouse controls scale emphasis.

conv-fractal-kernel.name: Fractal Kernel
conv-fractal-kernel.reason: Convolution kernel shaped by Mandelbrot set membership. Pixels inside the fractal are sampled, creating alien mathematically beautiful blur patterns. Alpha stores fractal iteration depth. Mouse warps the Mandelbrot center live.

conv-frequency-domain-notch.name: Frequency Domain Notch
conv-frequency-domain-notch.reason: Spatial-domain approximation of frequency notch filtering using tuned sinusoidal convolution kernels. Removes moire patterns or creates frequency painting. Alpha stores spectral response magnitude. Mouse selects target frequency band.

conv-gabor-texture-analyzer.name: Gabor Texture Analyzer
conv-gabor-texture-analyzer.reason: Gabor filter bank detecting oriented texture patterns at 0, 45, 90, and 135 degrees. RGBA32FLOAT stores signed bipolar responses in all four channels. Mouse rotates the filter bank for swirling texture segmentation.

conv-guided-filter-depth.name: Guided Filter Depth
conv-guided-filter-depth.reason: Guided filter using depth texture as guide for edge-aware filtering. Creates depth-of-field blur that perfectly respects object boundaries. Alpha stores filtering confidence coefficient. Mouse creates localized focus aperture.

conv-guided-video-filter.name: Guided Video Filter
conv-guided-video-filter.reason: Guided image filter that uses the original crisp video frame as the guide image to restore sharp edges on heavily processed or convoluted content from the previous slot pass. Eliminates halo artifacts while preserving painterly, glitch, or artistic effects inside smooth regions. Mouse proximity creates a live sharpening lens.

conv-morphological-erosion-dilation.name: Morphological Erosion Dilation
conv-morphological-erosion-dilation.reason: Mathematical morphology on images — erosion shrinks bright regions, dilation expands them. RGBA32FLOAT packs erosion (R), dilation (G), gradient (B), and top-hat (A) into one pass. Mouse controls directional structuring element.

conv-non-local-means.name: Non-Local Means
conv-non-local-means.reason: Gold-standard denoising that averages similar patches across the image. Cranked to artistic overdrive for hallucinatory double-exposure effects. Alpha stores self-similarity importance map. Mouse controls focus zone precision.

conv-reaction-convolution.name: Reaction Convolution
conv-reaction-convolution.reason: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion applied as a convolution filter on the input image. Uses image luminance to seed chemical concentrations and mouse interaction to inject patterns.

conv-spiral-blur.name: Spiral Blur
conv-spiral-blur.reason: Logarithmic spiral convolution creating rotational motion blur along golden ratio spirals. RGBA32FLOAT stores HDR accumulated color and spiral coverage factor. Mouse controls spiral center and tightness for vortex-like effects.

conv-steerable-pyramid.name: Steerable Pyramid
conv-steerable-pyramid.reason: Decomposes image into oriented sub-bands at 0, 45, 90, and 135 degrees using steerable filters. RGBA32FLOAT stores full-precision signed sub-band coefficients for lossless reconstruction or artistic boosting. Mouse steers the decomposition angle.

conv-stochastic-stipple.name: Stochastic Stipple
conv-stochastic-stipple.reason: Blue-noise dithered weighted Voronoi stippling creating pointillist art from any image. Each dot represents a local neighborhood sized by average luminance. Alpha stores continuous stipple density for downstream dot-size variation. Mouse creates higher-resolution stipple zone.

conv-structure-tensor-flow.name: Structure Tensor Flow
conv-structure-tensor-flow.reason: Computes structure tensor, extracts eigenvectors for dominant texture orientation, and visualizes flow via Line Integral Convolution. RGBA32FLOAT packs eigenvector components, coherency, and LIC intensity. Mouse creates vortices in the flow field.

coral-growth.name: Coral Growth
coral-growth.reason: Procedural coral and lichen branching structures that grow organically across cells. Audio accelerates growth and adds color vibrancy.

cross-conv-mouse-bilateral.name: Bilateral Paint
cross-conv-mouse-bilateral.reason: Crossover shader combining bilateral convolution with mouse-driven painting. The cursor acts as a brush that applies edge-preserving smoothing — stronger near the cursor, with click boosting the effect.

cross-mouse-spec-dispersion-lens.name: Prismatic Lens
cross-mouse-spec-dispersion-lens.reason: Crossover shader combining mouse-driven lens interaction with physical spectral dispersion. The cursor becomes a prismatic lens that refracts RGB channels differently using Cauchy's equation.

cross-spec-alpha-spectral-bloom.name: Spectral Bloom HDR
cross-spec-alpha-spectral-bloom.reason: Crossover shader combining spectral dispersion with HDR bloom using RGBA as independent spectral bands. Decomposes the image into wavelength channels and applies per-band bloom with exposure control in alpha.

crt-scanline-damage.name: CRT Scanline Damage
crt-scanline-damage.reason: Damaged CRT monitor simulation with barrel distortion, RGB phosphor mask, scanlines, temporal phosphor decay via dataTextureC, audio-driven chromatic barrel separation, depth-aware distortion, and occasional vertical roll.

crt-tv-stipple.name: CRT TV Stipple
crt-tv-stipple.reason: Authentic CRT TV simulation with blue-noise stippled phosphor dots. Combines barrel distortion, chromatic aberration, scanlines, and phosphor decay with perceptually optimal blue-noise dot placement for each RGB subpixel triad.

crystal-mosaic.name: Crystal Mosaic
crystal-mosaic.reason: Image broken into triangular mosaic tiles that rotate based on mouse proximity. Chromatic edges at tile boundaries with depth parallax shifting.

crystalline-fracture.name: Crystalline Fracture
crystalline-fracture.reason: Fracture mechanics simulation with stress intensity factor-driven crack propagation, branching, percolation connectivity, and hackle marks on translucent crystal surfaces. Thin-film iridescence and subsurface scattering. Audio loads stress and triggers catastrophic failure; mouse applies point stress. Depth controls crystal thickness perspective.

crystalline-shatter.name: Crystalline Shatter
crystalline-shatter.reason: Voronoi cell decomposition shatters the image into crystal facets, each refracting light independently with chromatic aberration. Bass pulses crack new cells; mouse proximity amplifies the shatter.

crystalline-veins.name: Crystalline Veins
crystalline-veins.reason: Mineral vein patterns growing through dark stone. FBM-based crack and vein generation with gold, copper, and silver chromatic veins. Bass drives vein pulse, mids control growth density, treble adds crystalline sparkles. Mouse attracts vein growth.

data-moshing-diffusion.name: Data Moshing Diffusion
data-moshing-diffusion.reason: Data moshing with anisotropic diffusion, chromatic per-channel diffusion offsets, audio-reactive smear strength, temporal smear persistence, and mouse swirl injection.

datamosh-brush-diffusion.name: Datamosh Brush Diffusion
datamosh-brush-diffusion.reason: Interactive datamoshing brush with anisotropic diffusion. Paint to freeze or corrupt pixels while Perona-Malik diffusion smooths along edges, creating oil-painted MPEG artifact trails with temporal persistence.

deep-sea-thermal-vent.name: Deep Sea Thermal Vent
deep-sea-thermal-vent.reason: Hydrothermal vent on the ocean floor: billowing mineral-rich plumes rise upward, glowing with chemosynthetic life. Bass swells the plumes, mids add particle turbulence, treble creates bioluminescent microbe flashes. Mouse distorts vent flow.

deep-workgroup-multi-effect-blend.name: Deep-Workgroup Multi-Effect Blend
deep-workgroup-multi-effect-blend.reason: Uses a 16×16×4 workgroup (1024 invocations) to run four effects simultaneously in Z-lanes — edge detection, bloom, hue-shift, and phosphor glow — then blends them via workgroup shared memory. Requires a GPU with maxComputeInvocationsPerWorkgroup ≥ 1024 (Apple M1+, NVIDIA RTX, AMD RDNA2+).

digital-crease.name: Digital Crease
digital-crease.reason: Origami crease pattern simulation with mountain/valley assignment, Kawasaki-Justin flat-foldability approximation, depth-driven layer shadows, digital paper fiber texture, chromatic folding, HDR crease specular, and ACES tone mapping. Bass drives fold speed; mouse performs local folds; depth controls layer ordering.

digital-decay-rgba.name: Digital Decay RGBA
digital-decay-rgba.reason: Digital block corruption feeds into a 4-species reaction-diffusion system. Corrupted pixels become chemical seeds that evolve into organic decay patterns, merging glitch aesthetics with emergent biological forms.

digital-glitch-pass1.name: Digital Glitch (Pass 1)
digital-glitch-pass1.reason: Glitch field generation: block displacement, scanline tearing, bitwise corruption seeds, and per-pixel corruption masks. Outputs glitch field to dataTextureA.

digital-glitch-pass2.name: Digital Glitch (Pass 2)
digital-glitch-pass2.reason: Error propagation and compositing pass: neighbor error spreading, digital decay with bit-depth reduction, chromatic aberration, scanline artifacts, and block inversion. Reads glitch field from dataTextureC.

double-exposure-hdr.name: Double Exposure HDR
double-exposure-hdr.reason: Ghostly double exposure blending combined with HDR bloom chain. The image overlays a zoomed/rotated version of itself, then luminous halos form around bright overlap regions with ACES tone mapping. Mouse sets the pivot point.

electric-eel-storm.name: Electric Eel Storm
electric-eel-storm.reason: Electric eels swimming through a conductive storm cloud, discharging arcs between them. Bass drives eel body pulses, mids create storm cloud turbulence, treble triggers lightning arc flashes. Mouse attracts the eel school.

ember-drift-dissolve.name: Ember Drift Dissolve
ember-drift-dissolve.reason: Bright areas of the image lift off as glowing embers and are carried upward by a living heat field. Creates haunting, beautiful disintegration especially on video. Treble controls spark density while bass thickens the rising glow.

emergent-calligraphic-weave.name: Emergent Calligraphic Weave
emergent-calligraphic-weave.reason: Sumi-e ink wash simulation with pressure-sensitive Bézier brush strokes, ink viscosity flow, paper absorption capillary action, and dry-brush texture. Audio drives brush speed and splatter; mouse acts as the brush with pressure from click duration. Depth scales paper grain.

encaustic-wax-blackbody.name: Encaustic Wax Blackbody
encaustic-wax-blackbody.reason: Physical encaustic wax simulation combined with blackbody thermal radiation coloring. Thick wax pools glow like cooling magma with physically-correct color temperature, while thin glaze remains translucent amber. Mouse melts wax creating localized thermal hotspots.

engraving-stipple-blue-noise.name: Engraving Stipple Blue Noise
engraving-stipple-blue-noise.reason: Traditional copper-plate engraving stipple fused with blue-noise dithered pointillism. Golden-ratio low-discrepancy sequences create perceptually optimal dot distributions. Mouse acts as raking light revealing engraved depth.

fabric-step-gabor.name: Fabric Step Gabor
fabric-step-gabor.reason: Mass-spring cloth simulation deforms the image into flowing folds, then Gabor filter banks detect oriented texture patterns across the fabric. Strain creates visual texture mapped to psychedelic orientation colors. Mouse pulls and tears the textile.

ferrofluid-spikes.name: Ferrofluid Spikes
ferrofluid-spikes.reason: Mouse-driven ferrofluid simulation. The cursor acts as a magnet, pulling up metallic spikes from a dark liquid surface. Audio adds turbulence.

film-cross-process.name: Film Cross-Process
film-cross-process.reason: Simulates E6 slide film developed in C41 negative chemistry. Each RGB channel is routed through a different S-curve (lifted shadows, crushed mids, blown highlights), the colour gamut is skewed so greens shift cyan and reds shift orange-yellow, film grain is layered in, and the image is pushed toward the iconic high-contrast vivid-yet-desaturated cross-processed aesthetic. Bass boosts contrast punch; mids intensify the colour skew; treble raises grain texture.

film-gate-weave.name: Film Gate Weave
film-gate-weave.reason: Accurate 35mm film gate weave simulation with perforation hole registration jitter, gate flutter from intermittent motion, and film scratch generation with temporal persistence. Film grain with dye cloud structure, gate hair accumulation, splice tape artifacts, ACES tone mapping, and chromatic aberration from lens breathing.

fractal-boids-field.name: Fractal Boids Field
fractal-boids-field.reason: Flocking behavior on a fractal vector field. Swarms of particles flowing through organic fractal currents.

fractal-boids-field-coupled.name: Fractal Boids Field + Fluid Coupling
fractal-boids-field-coupled.reason: Flocking behavior on a fractal vector field with viscous mouse fluid coupling. Mouse wakes push boids; click ripples spawn shockwaves through the flock.

fractal-ice-palace.name: Fractal Ice Palace
fractal-ice-palace.reason: Recursive ice crystal palace with fractal branching architecture. Chromatic ice refractions: blue core, cyan edges, white sparkle. Bass shakes the palace, mids control recursion depth visually, treble adds frost glitter. Mouse melts local ice.

gen-3d-sierpinski-chaos.name: 3D Sierpinski Chaos Game
gen-3d-sierpinski-chaos.reason: Iterated function system rendering a 3D Sierpinski tetrahedron using the chaos game algorithm. Thousands of point samples create intricate cloud-like renders of the fractal solid with depth-based coloring and perspective projection. Mouse rotates the 3D view in real-time.

gen-4d-projection-dream-weavers.name: 4D Projection Dream Weavers
gen-4d-projection-dream-weavers.reason: Smooth continuous slicing and projection through higher-dimensional fractals and lattices. Mouse controls navigation through the extra two dimensions providing genuine higher-dimensional exploration. Audio affects fractal parameters and projection quality. Ethereal mathematical dream-like forms.

gen-abyssal-chrono-coral.name: Abyssal Chrono-Coral
gen-abyssal-chrono-coral.reason: A vast abyssal coral reef drifting through gravitational time. Slow geological growth rings expand over eons. Mids and treble drive bioluminescent pulses. Mouse clicks create sediment disturbance events that trigger sudden bloom explosions across the reef. Gravitational lensing bends light around dense coral structures.

gen-abyssal-leviathan-scales.name: Abyssal Leviathan-Scales
gen-abyssal-leviathan-scales.reason: A mesmerizing, infinite expanse of massive, interlocking biomechanical armor scales that undulate like a breathing cosmic leviathan, parting to reveal a blazing, audio-reactive quantum fusion core beneath.

gen-acid-lissajous.name: Acid Lissajous

gen-alpha-aurora.name: Alpha Aurora

gen-apollonian-gasket.name: Apollonian Gasket

gen-astro-kinetic-chrono-orrery.name: Astro-Kinetic Chrono-Orrery

gen-coral-reef-colony.name: Coral Reef Colony

gen-cymatic-plasma-mandalas.name: Cymatic Plasma-Mandalas

gen-de-jong-attractor.name: Peter de Jong Attractor
gen-de-jong-attractor.reason: Strange attractor density accumulation for the 2D Peter de Jong map: x' = sin(a·y)−cos(b·x), y' = sin(c·x)−cos(d·y). Temporal Monte Carlo builds density; bass warps the geometry; mouse pans and click-zooms.

gen-depth-refracted-liquid-stained-glass.name: Depth-Refracted Liquid Stained Glass
gen-depth-refracted-liquid-stained-glass.reason: Polar facet refraction with chromatic edge dispersion per depth edge, temporal caustic flicker, audio-driven refraction strength, and depth-aware bevel normals. Fixed float-modulus bug.

gen-dla-copper-deposition.name: DLA Copper Deposition
gen-dla-copper-deposition.reason: Procedural diffusion-limited aggregation copper dendrite growth. Domain-warped fBm noise simulates random walker deposition with stick probability, producing metallic branching structures with oxidation patina and electrolyte depletion fields.

gen-dmt-fractal-zoom.name: DMT Fractal Zoom
gen-dmt-fractal-zoom.reason: An infinite zoom through a fractal landscape with DMT-vision-like visual complexity. Each zoom level reveals new fractal details. Colors are extremely saturated rainbow gradients that shift as you zoom. Mouse controls zoom speed, direction, and panning. Mandelbrot-Burning Ship hybrid with heavy post-processing glow.

gen-dragon-curve.name: Dragon Curve
gen-dragon-curve.reason: Heighway dragon curve — a space-filling fractal created by repeatedly folding a strip of paper in half. Rendered as a glowing neon line with iteration-depth coloring from red to violet. Audio drives fold depth, mouse zooms into detail, and depth controls line thickness perspective.

gen-dynamic-tessellation-ornate-fractal-.name: Dynamic Tessellation (Ornate Fractal Tiles)
gen-dynamic-tessellation-ornate-fractal-.reason: Compute a screen-space tile grid and replace each tile with a tiny procedurally rendered fractal. The result is a morphing lattice of fractal mini-universes. Now audio-reactive to bass frequencies with meaningful alpha compositing.

gen-echo-dunes.name: Echo Dunes
gen-echo-dunes.reason: Wind-carved sand ridges with heat mirage distortions and cursor-centered acoustic echo rings.

gen-eldritch-quantum-fractal-eye.name: Eldritch-Quantum Fractal-Eye
gen-eldritch-quantum-fractal-eye.reason: A colossal, hyper-dimensional eye constructed from infinitely folding quantum fractals and liquid plasma.

gen-eldritch-tesseract-hive-mind.name: Eldritch Tesseract-Hive Mind
gen-eldritch-tesseract-hive-mind.reason: An impossible, non-Euclidean hypercube hive populated by swarms of luminescent algorithmic sentinels, constantly unfolding and fracturing into new geometric dimensions driven by quantum noise and acoustic energy.

gen-erosion-strata.name: Erosion Strata

gen-feedback-echo-chamber.name: Feedback Echo Chamber

gen-ghost-flame.name: Ghost Flame

gen-glacial-aether-quantum-cavern.name: Glacial-Aether Quantum-Cavern

gen-luminous-cauldron.name: Luminous Cauldron
