hyper-tensor-fluid-coupled.name: Hyper Tensor Fluid + Mouse Coupling
hyper-tensor-fluid-coupled.reason: Tensor-field fluid dynamics with viscous mouse stirring. Mouse injects velocity and vorticity; click ripples spawn radial fluid bursts.

hyperbolic-crystal-symbiosis.name: Hyperbolic Crystal Symbiosis
hyperbolic-crystal-symbiosis.reason: Voronoi crystal facets on a true Poincaré disk with geodesic distance and Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion. Iridescent thin-film coloring on facet edges with HDR bloom at triple junctions. Bass drives crystal growth, mids morph between hyperbolic/parabolic/Euclidean curvature, treble adds sparkle. Mouse warps the disk center.

ink-diffusion.name: Ink Diffusion
ink-diffusion.reason: Navier-Stokes advection-diffusion ink simulation in water with vorticity confinement and surface tension at boundaries. Sumi-e ink wash with turbulent eddies, paper fiber texture, chromatic edge darkening, ACES tone mapping, and HDR specular on wet regions.

ink-dispersion-guided.name: Ink Dispersion Guided
ink-dispersion-guided.reason: Depth-guided edge-preserving filter combined with ink-style halftone rendering. The guided filter smooths based on depth boundaries, then the result is rendered as ink dots with paper texture.

lava-lamp-blobs.name: Lava Lamp Blobs
lava-lamp-blobs.reason: Metaball lava blobs rise and merge with chromatic warm-cool color shifts and audio-reactive heat.

lenia-on-video.name: Lenia on Video
lenia-on-video.reason: Continuous Lenia cellular automaton (Chan 2019) seeded and continuously driven by live video. Video luminance seeds the initial cell state; video hue and saturation modulate Lenia's growth center and width parameters in real time, coupling the CA tightly to the subject. Bass beats inject fresh cells from bright video regions. Mouse spawns or clears cells. Outputs a neon bioluminescent CA layer composited over the source video.

lenticular-holographic-shift.name: Lenticular Holographic Shift
lenticular-holographic-shift.reason: Simulates a lenticular/holographic print that dramatically shifts perspective, color, and moiré interference as you move the mouse or as audio beats. Stunning on portraits and detailed imagery.

liquid-magnetic-ferro-em.name: Liquid Magnetic Ferro EM
liquid-magnetic-ferro-em.reason: Ferrofluid simulation coupled with electromagnetic wave propagation. Rosensweig instability spikes are driven by both static magnetic dipoles and time-varying EM waves, with metallic iridescence colored by field direction.

liquid-metal-prismatic.name: Liquid Metal Prismatic
liquid-metal-prismatic.reason: Liquid metal ripple distortion combined with 4-band spectral prismatic dispersion. Curved metal surface acts as a dynamic liquid prism — ripples create varying curvature that refracts light into separated wavelength bands via Cauchy's equation.

liquid-optimized.name: Liquid Surface Tension (Optimized)
liquid-optimized.reason: Surface tension liquid simulation with shared memory optimization. Uses workgroup-local caching to reduce texture fetches by 80% for 8-10x performance improvement. Audio reactivity drives ambient wave amplitude and virtual ripple sources.

liquid-optimized-pass1.name: Liquid Optimized (Pass 1)
liquid-optimized-pass1.reason: Physics simulation pass: capillary wave dynamics, Laplace pressure, ripple propagation, and ambient micro-ripples. Outputs height field state to dataTextureA.

liquid-optimized-pass2.name: Liquid Optimized (Pass 2)
liquid-optimized-pass2.reason: Fluid rendering pass: Fresnel reflection, Beer-Lambert absorption, specular highlights, and alpha blending. Reads physics state from dataTextureC.

liquid-pass1.name: Liquid (Pass 1)
liquid-pass1.reason: Capillary wave physics pass: surface tension simulation with Laplacian and biharmonic operators, gravity waves, ripple sources, and ambient micro-ripples. Outputs persistent height field to dataTextureA.

liquid-pass2.name: Liquid (Pass 2)
liquid-pass2.reason: Fluid rendering pass: surface normal calculation, Snell's law refraction, Fresnel reflection, Beer-Lambert wavelength-dependent absorption, specular highlights, and physics-based alpha blending.

liquid-tensor-vortex.name: Liquid Tensor Vortex
liquid-tensor-vortex.reason: A 3D tensor field that melts and reforms like liquid metal under mouse vorticity, with bass-driven surface tension and transmission alpha that lets the background breathe through the folds.

long-exposure.name: Long Exposure Light Painting
long-exposure.reason: Simulates an open camera shutter accumulating light over time. Bright regions of each frame persist and blend into a glowing exposure buffer stored in dataTextureC; darker regions fade slowly, leaving luminous light-painting trails. Mouse click resets the exposure. Bass brightens incoming frames for punchier accumulation; mids control bloom halo radius; treble adds sparkle to the brightest traces.

magnetic-flux-garden.name: Magnetic Flux Garden
magnetic-flux-garden.reason: Ferrofluid-like magnetic field lines curve between cursor poles, blooming with organic turbulence and treble seeds.

mercury-temporal-mirror.name: Mercury Temporal Mirror
mercury-temporal-mirror.reason: The input image is reflected in a living liquid mercury surface whose ripples persist and evolve over time. Mouse presses create visceral impact dents that propagate realistically. Audio controls the viscosity and thickness of the metal.

morphogenic-resonance.name: Morphogenic Resonance
morphogenic-resonance.reason: Organic shapes that morph between geometric and biological forms via sinusoidal interpolation. Bass drives morph speed, mids add surface ripple resonance, treble creates edge discharge. Mouse warps the morph field.

mouse-chromatic-explosion.name: Chromatic Explosion
mouse-chromatic-explosion.reason: The mouse drives a smooth displacement field with spectral tinting via mix and alpha translucency blending. Click ripples launch shockwaves. Audio-reactive bass pulses the entire field.

mouse-electromagnetic-aurora.name: Electromagnetic Aurora
mouse-electromagnetic-aurora.reason: The mouse acts as a moving electric charge generating flowing EM field lines that distort UVs and rotate hue. Click ripples spawn orbiting opposite-polarity charges.

mouse-fluid-coupling.name: Fluid Coupling
mouse-fluid-coupling.reason: The mouse drags a viscous fluid over the image, creating vortex streets and color absorption. Click ripples inject fluid bursts.

mouse-hyperbolic-navigator.name: Hyperbolic Navigator
mouse-hyperbolic-navigator.reason: Navigate an infinitely tiling hyperbolic plane via Möbius transformations driven by mouse position. The image maps onto a Poincaré disk with tiles shrinking toward the boundary.

mouse-ink-bleed.name: Mouse Ink Bleed
mouse-ink-bleed.reason: Organic ink that bleeds and diffuses outward from the mouse position with turbulent, painterly motion. Audio adds life to the spread and color.

mouse-julia-morph.name: Julia Morph
mouse-julia-morph.reason: Mouse position controls the Julia set constant c for real-time fractal morphing. Click ripples pin configurations that blend together over the input image palette.

mouse-kaleidoscope-tunnel.name: Kaleidoscope Tunnel
mouse-kaleidoscope-tunnel.reason: Infinite kaleidoscope tunnel centered on the mouse. Moving creates spiraling mirrors with perspective depth. Click ripples send kaleidoscope bursts through the tunnel.

mouse-magnetic-pixel-sand.name: Magnetic Pixel Sand
mouse-magnetic-pixel-sand.reason: Pixels behave as iron filings attracted or repelled by the mouse magnet based on their brightness. Creates flowing metallic grain patterns with ripple magnetic pulses.

mouse-mandelbrot-zoom-portal.name: Mandelbrot Zoom Portal
mouse-mandelbrot-zoom-portal.reason: Navigate the infinite Mandelbrot set with mouse position. Click to create nested zoom portals that reveal deeper fractal levels.

mouse-neural-dreamscape.name: Neural Dreamscape
mouse-neural-dreamscape.reason: A virtual neural network grid activates around the mouse. Neurons glow and synapse connections pulse with activation. Click ripples send waves through the network.

mouse-paint-splatter.name: Paint Splatter
mouse-paint-splatter.reason: Mouse drags leave colorful paint splatters sampled from the image. Paint spreads, mixes, and dries over time. Click ripples create explosive paint bursts.

mouse-polarized-light-field.name: Polarized Light Field
mouse-polarized-light-field.reason: Mouse controls polarization angle and birefringence over the image. Creates interference fringes, Malus-law filtering, and moiré patterns. Click ripples spawn polarization vortices.

mouse-synesthetic-sound-paint.name: Synesthetic Sound Paint
mouse-synesthetic-sound-paint.reason: Mouse becomes a conductor directing a visual orchestra. Screen regions map to bass blobs, mid waves, and treble sparkles. Without audio, falls back to mouse-driven generative color synthesis.

mouse-time-crystal.name: Time Crystal
mouse-time-crystal.reason: Mouse clicks seed crystal growth via diffusion-limited aggregation. Crystals grow along image gradients, aging and cooling over time. Creates organic mineral formations.

mouse-voronoi-mosaic.name: Voronoi Mosaic
mouse-voronoi-mosaic.reason: Click positions seed Voronoi cells that rotate, shift, and scale independently. Stained-glass edge effects with per-cell color tinting create an evolving mosaic.

mouse-wormhole-lens.name: Wormhole Lens
mouse-wormhole-lens.reason: A wormhole portal at the mouse position inverts, spirals, and color-shifts the image inside. Dragging stretches the portal. Event-horizon glow and gravitational lensing at the edge.

multi-fractal-compositor.name: Multi-Fractal Compositor
multi-fractal-compositor.reason: Smoothly blend between multiple fractal types. Mandelbrot, Julia, Burning Ship, and Newton fractals.

multi-fractal-compositor-lens.name: Multi-Fractal Compositor + Gravitational Lens
multi-fractal-compositor-lens.reason: Multi-layer fractal compositor with mouse-controlled gravitational lensing. Mouse mass bends UV coordinates; ripples create temporary mass concentrations with Einstein ring glow.

multi-scale-evolutionary-cellular-garden.name: Multi-Scale Evolutionary Cellular Gardens
multi-scale-evolutionary-cellular-garden.reason: Two competing cellular species whose growth rules slowly evolve under audio pressure. The garden changes its fundamental behavior over time while remaining visually coherent.

mycelium-network.name: Mycelium Network
mycelium-network.reason: Underground fungal hyphae network with pulsing nutrient flows traveling along branches. Audio triggers bright nutrient pulses.

nano-assembler-crystal.name: Nano Assembler Crystal
nano-assembler-crystal.reason: Grid-based nanobots assemble into crystalline structures using phase-field dynamics. RGBA stores assembly phase, temperature, crystal orientation, and impurity. Mouse disrupts assembly causing scatter; ripples trigger nucleation. Displays nanobot glow when disassembled and orientation-dependent crystal color when assembled.

neon-edge-glow.name: Neon Edge Glow
neon-edge-glow.reason: Gas discharge tube simulation with accurate neon emission spectrum, AC rectification flicker, mercury vapor secondary lines, electrode sputtering, and atmospheric haze. Bass drives flicker frequency, mouse bends the tube, depth controls atmospheric scatter.

neon-fern-garden.name: Neon Fern Garden
neon-fern-garden.reason: Procedurally generated fern fronds unfurling in neon colors against dark soil. Bass drives growth animation, mids control frond density, treble creates dewdrop sparkles. Mouse attracts or repels frond tips.

neon-pulse-dissolve.name: Neon Pulse Dissolve
neon-pulse-dissolve.reason: Audio-reactive neon edge detection that pulses with bass and dissolves the image interior into luminous colour noise driven by mid and treble frequencies.

neon-quantum-lattice.name: Neon Quantum Lattice
neon-quantum-lattice.reason: Aperiodic Penrose-like quasi-crystal tiling with neon edge glow, metallic fill gradients, HDR vertex bloom, and quantum uncertainty zones.

neural-mandala.name: Neural Mandala
neural-mandala.reason: Concentric geometric rings with interconnected node networks that pulse and evolve. Audio drives ring expansion and node brightness.

neural-raymarcher.name: Neural Raymarcher
neural-raymarcher.reason: Raymarched neural network with activation visualization. Glowing 3D structure with weights as connection thickness.

neural-raymarcher-gabor.name: Neural Raymarcher Gabor
neural-raymarcher-gabor.reason: Raymarched neural network visualization with Gabor oriented texture detection. Gabor responses highlight connection directions and layer boundaries with psychedelic color mapping.

neural-synapse-web.name: Neural Synapse Web
neural-synapse-web.reason: Pulsing neural network nodes connected by synaptic signal lines, with audio-triggered pulses traveling connections.

oil-slick-iridescence.name: Oil Slick Iridescence
oil-slick-iridescence.reason: Thin-film optical interference simulation, like oil on water. A procedural flowing height map modulates film thickness, producing shifting rainbow iridescence. Bass warps the film; mouse creates ripples.

optical-flow-tracer.name: Optical Flow Tracer
optical-flow-tracer.reason: Lucas-Kanade optical flow tracer: computes per-pixel motion vectors between the current frame and the previous history frame, then warps after-images along those trajectories. Moving objects leave physically-accurate ghost trails that follow actual motion paths rather than fading in place.

painterly-oil-bilateral.name: Painterly Oil + Bilateral Dream
painterly-oil-bilateral.reason: Oil painting simulation with anisotropic Kuwahara, color quantization, and impasto texture, post-processed with edge-preserving bilateral filter for a dreamy smoothness. Mouse focus aperture controls sharpness.

particle-dreams-hdr.name: Particle Dreams HDR
particle-dreams-hdr.reason: Multi-layer depth particle accumulation with HDR bloom chain. 5 depth layers with flow noise and vortex distortion, combined with exposure-based radial bloom and ACES tone mapping.

phase-memory-weave.name: Phase Memory Weave
phase-memory-weave.reason: Continuous Ginzburg-Landau order parameter with Allen-Cahn interface energy and exponential-decay memory kernel. Opalescent thin-film interference on phase boundaries with fluid caustics and crystalline subsurface scattering. Bass nucleates crystal seeds, mids control grain boundary mobility, treble adds capillary waves. Mouse deposits heat or cold based on click parity.

phosphorescent-jellyfish.name: Phosphorescent Jellyfish
phosphorescent-jellyfish.reason: Glowing jellyfish with trailing tentacle bioluminescence. Bass pulses the bell contraction, mids create tentacle wave motion, treble adds individual photophore sparkles. Mouse attracts the jellyfish swarm.

photonic-caustics-iridescence.name: Photonic Caustics Iridescence
photonic-caustics-iridescence.reason: Backward photon-traced caustics combined with thin-film interference iridescence. Caustic intensity modulates film thickness, creating soap-bubble colors on light concentrations. Features chromatic dispersion, Fresnel reflections, and temporal accumulation.

pixel-tornado.name: Pixel Tornado
pixel-tornado.reason: A pixel-level tornado vortex whose eye tracks the mouse. Bass energy widens the funnel; treble adds turbulent jitter. Click ripples send radial shockwaves through the frame.

plasma-jet-stream.name: Plasma Jet Stream
plasma-jet-stream.reason: High-energy plasma jets radiate from center with bass-driven intensity, mids-driven spread, and treble sparks.

plasma-orb.name: Plasma Orb
plasma-orb.reason: Magnetohydrodynamic plasma orb with tokamak-style field lines, Alfvén waves, magnetic reconnection flares, and synchrotron emission. Audio drives plasma temperature and field chaos; mouse pinches the orb. Depth controls field line density perspective.

porcelain-fracture-glow.name: Porcelain Fracture Glow
porcelain-fracture-glow.reason: The image is rendered on delicate porcelain that develops fine luminous cracks. The cracks follow image edges and can be drawn with the mouse. Bass makes the golden light pulse and sing through the fractures.

posterize-neon-edges.name: Posterize Neon Edges
posterize-neon-edges.reason: Edge-aware posterization with FBM-noise organic boundaries, multi-band luminance quantization, HDR neon bloom with ACES tone mapping, and cyan/magenta split-tone. Audio-reactive and mouse-driven.

pp-bloom.name: PP Bloom
pp-bloom.reason: High-quality HDR bloom with multi-tap Gaussian blur, anamorphic stretch, and lens dirt effects

pp-chromatic.name: PP Chromatic
pp-chromatic.reason: Chromatic aberration with RGB channel separation, barrel/pincushion distortion, and vignette

pp-sharpen.name: PP Sharpen
pp-sharpen.reason: Unsharp mask sharpening with edge detection, halo control, and multiple enhancement modes

pp-ssao.name: PP SSAO
pp-ssao.reason: Screen-space ambient occlusion for added depth, with color bleeding from occluding surfaces

pp-tone-map.name: PP Tone Map
pp-tone-map.reason: HDR to LDR tone mapping with ACES, Uncharted 2, Reinhard, and AgX algorithms. Includes exposure, contrast, and saturation controls.

pp-vignette.name: PP Vignette
pp-vignette.reason: Film vignette with grain, sepia/warm/cool color grading, and retro scanline effects

predator-prey-rgba.name: Predator-Prey RGBA
predator-prey-rgba.reason: Continuous-density predator-prey ecosystem simulation packed into RGBA32FLOAT. Plants photosynthesize using source image luminance, herbivores graze, carnivores hunt, and toxins accumulate from overpopulation. Species diffuse across the grid creating emergent spatial waves.

pyramid-bandprocess-pass2.name: Gaussian-Laplacian Pyramid (Pass 2: Band Processing)
pyramid-bandprocess-pass2.reason: Pass 2 of 3: Extracts Laplacian (high-freq residual = original − prev-frame blur) and applies per-band creative effects: neon edge saturation (L0), audio-bass hue rotation (L1), slow LFO colour breathing (L2). Audio-reactive via plasmaBuffer.

pyramid-composite-pass3.name: Gaussian-Laplacian Pyramid (Pass 3: ROI Magnifying Glass)
pyramid-composite-pass3.reason: Pass 3 of 3: Final composite with ROI magnifying-glass effect. Inside the mouse-tracked circle (radius = zoom_params.w) all frequency bands are amplified 2.5×+, creating a psychedelic detail magnifier. Outside the circle, effects are subtle. A pulsing ring marks the ROI boundary.

pyramid-downsample-pass1.name: Gaussian-Laplacian Pyramid (Pass 1: Gaussian Blur)
pyramid-downsample-pass1.reason: Pass 1 of 3: Separable Gaussian blur via 18×18 shared-memory tile. Stores the blurred image for the next frame's Laplacian decomposition. Chain with pyramid-bandprocess-pass2.

quantum-foam-bilateral.name: Quantum Foam Bilateral
quantum-foam-bilateral.reason: Quantum foam chromatic parallax diffusion with edge-preserving bilateral smoothing. Cell boundaries and emissive edges remain crisp while foam interiors are dreamily smoothed.

quantum-foam-lattice.name: Quantum Foam Lattice
quantum-foam-lattice.reason: Quantum foam visualization: bubbling vacuum fluctuations forming a crystalline lattice that pulses to bass. Mids drive lattice distortions, treble creates sparkles at node intersections. Mouse warps the lattice locally.

quantum-foam-pass1.name: Quantum Foam (Pass 1: Field Generation)
quantum-foam-pass1.reason: Generates quantum probability field with curl noise and FBM. First pass of 3-pass system.

quantum-foam-pass2.name: Quantum Foam (Pass 2: Particle Advection)
quantum-foam-pass2.reason: Advects particles through the quantum field. Second pass of 3-pass system.

quantum-foam-pass3.name: Quantum Foam (Pass 3: Compositing)
quantum-foam-pass3.reason: Volumetric rendering and final compositing with glow and tone mapping. Third pass of 3-pass system.

quantum-ghost.name: Quantum Ghost
quantum-ghost.reason: Quantum uncertainty visualization with Gaussian wave packet spreading, interference patterns from partial measurement, and entanglement correlation lines between ghost copies. Ghostly translucent copies with phase-dependent opacity, neon quantum numbers, HDR bloom on measurement events, ACES tone mapping, and chromatic separation by momentum uncertainty.

rd-on-video-pass1.name: RD on Video (Pass 1: State Update)
rd-on-video-pass1.reason: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion seeded and continuously driven by video luminance.

rd-on-video-pass2.name: RD on Video (Pass 2: Turing Color Map)
rd-on-video-pass2.reason: Color-maps reaction-diffusion chemistry into vivid Turing pattern fields.

rd-on-video-pass3.name: RD on Video (Pass 3: Composite)
rd-on-video-pass3.reason: Composites Turing color output over video using luminance-aware masking.

recursive-ancestral-terrains.name: Recursive Ancestral Terrains
recursive-ancestral-terrains.reason: A fractal landscape where different ancestral 'lineages' of terrain rules coexist. Moving the mouse selects which generational traits are expressed in different regions, revealing the evolutionary history of the land.

retro-phosphor-hdr.name: Retro Phosphor HDR
retro-phosphor-hdr.reason: Authentic CRT phosphor simulation enhanced with HDR bloom chain. RGB triads, barrel distortion, scanlines, and temporal persistence combine with exposure-based bloom and ACES tone mapping for dramatic glowing phosphors.

retro-phosphor-stipple.name: Retro Phosphor Stipple
retro-phosphor-stipple.reason: CRT phosphor simulation with blue-noise stippled dot triads. Authentic barrel distortion, scanlines, and temporal persistence combined with perceptually optimal blue-noise dot placement for each RGB channel.

ripple-bloom.name: Ripple Bloom
ripple-bloom.reason: Huygens wavelet ripple simulation with frequency dispersion, chromatic dispersion on crests, HDR bloom on constructive interference, subsurface scattering in troughs, and ACES tone mapping. Bass drives ripple frequency, mouse drops stones, depth controls water depth.

sacred-geometry-torus.name: Sacred Geometry Torus
sacred-geometry-torus.reason: Golden ratio torus knots and sacred geometry nodes rotate in layered phi-harmonic patterns driven by bass.

sand-dunes.name: Sand Dunes
sand-dunes.reason: Bagnold dune physics with anisotropic fBm, separation bubbles at crests, and ripple superposition on slip faces. Desert palette with subsurface scattering and HDR saltation sparkles. Audio drives wind migration and treble sparkles. Mouse creates wind shadows. Depth controls atmospheric haze.

scanline-cyberpunk.name: Scanline Cyberpunk
scanline-cyberpunk.reason: CRT scanline grid with RGB phosphor triad mask layered over a cyberpunk cinematic colour grade (teal shadows, amber-magenta highlights). Bass drives glitch-roll bands; treble flickers brightness.

silk-flow-advection.name: Silk Flow Advection
silk-flow-advection.reason: The colors and details of the input are gently carried along living, silky curl-noise flows. The mouse acts like a finger disturbing delicate fabric. Creates beautiful organic painterly motion on stills and video.

sim-decay-system.name: Decay System
sim-decay-system.reason: Multi-layer decay and corrosion simulation. Image corrodes from edges inward with different materials.

sim-decay-system-rgba.name: Sim: Decay System RGBA
sim-decay-system-rgba.reason: Four-layer material decay simulation with cross-coupling. Paint integrity, metal corrosion, organic rot, and structural integrity each decay at different rates. When one layer fails, others decay faster. Mouse interaction can restore/repair.

sim-fluid-feedback-coupled.name: Fluid Feedback Coupled
sim-fluid-feedback-coupled.reason: Mouse-steerable coupled fluid simulation combining Navier-Stokes feedback fields with viscous fluid stirring. Mouse drags fluid creating vortex streets; click ripples inject bursts. Fluid thickness drives color absorption, blur, and glow.

sim-fluid-feedback-field.name: Fluid Feedback Field
sim-fluid-feedback-field.reason: Multi-pass Navier-Stokes fluid simulation with feedback trails. Glowing fluid that swirls and mixes.

sim-heat-haze-blackbody.name: Heat Haze Blackbody
sim-heat-haze-blackbody.reason: Temperature field convection simulation with physically-correct blackbody thermal glow. Hot ground and rising convection plumes radiate with Planck's law colors — cool air stays neutral while intense heat sources glow from red ember to blue-white.

sim-heat-haze-field.name: Heat Haze Field
sim-heat-haze-field.reason: Temperature simulation with convection currents. Desert mirage effect with rising heat patterns.

sim-ink-diffusion.name: Ink Diffusion
sim-ink-diffusion.reason: Fluid ink diffusion with paper absorption. Multi-channel Gray-Scott with Wolfram-validated parameters.

sim-ink-diffusion-rgba.name: Sim: Ink Diffusion RGBA
sim-ink-diffusion-rgba.reason: Four-ink wet diffusion simulation on paper texture. RGB channels hold cyan, magenta, and yellow pigment concentrations; alpha holds water saturation that drives all diffusion. Pigments mix subtractively on wet paper.

sim-sand-dunes.name: Sand Dunes
sim-sand-dunes.reason: Falling sand physics with wind erosion. Sand falls, piles at angle of repose, wind moves loose sand.

sim-sand-dunes-rgba.name: Sim: Sand Dunes RGBA
sim-sand-dunes-rgba.reason: Four-grain-type sand physics with distinct behaviors. Fine sand blows easily in wind, coarse sand is stable with high angle of repose, moist sand clumps together, and dust rises on updrafts. RGBA packs all grain fractions per cell.

sim-slime-mold-growth.name: Slime Mold Growth
sim-slime-mold-growth.reason: Physarum-style slime mold with trail following. Branching network of glowing trails exploring space.

sim-slime-mold-growth-em.name: Slime Mold Growth + EM Field
sim-slime-mold-growth-em.reason: Physarum slime mold simulation with mouse electromagnetic field interaction. Agents steer along electric field lines; click ripples spawn secondary charges.

sim-smoke-trails.name: Smoke Trails
sim-smoke-trails.reason: Volumetric smoke with vorticity and buoyancy. Billowing smoke rising with natural turbulence.

sim-smoke-trails-thermal.name: Smoke Trails Thermal
sim-smoke-trails-thermal.reason: Volumetric smoke fluid simulation with physically-correct blackbody thermal coloring. Smoke temperature maps to Kelvin via Planck's law — cool wisps glow ember-red, hot cores burn blue-white with Stefan-Boltzmann radiance scaling.

sim-volumetric-fake.name: Volumetric Fake (God Rays)
sim-volumetric-fake.reason: Fast approximation of volumetric lighting. Radial blur from light source with depth-based scattering.

sim-volumetric-fake-em.name: Volumetric Fake + EM Field
sim-volumetric-fake-em.reason: God rays with mouse electromagnetic field distortion. Electric field bends light rays; magnetic field causes chromatic RGB separation. Click ripples spawn secondary light charges.

slime-mold-on-video.name: Slime Mold on Video
slime-mold-on-video.reason: Video luminance feeds a slime-mold trail simulation. Audio shifts tendril colors (bass green, mids cyan, treble magenta). Depth boosts glow intensity. Mouse deposits extra food.

soft-vignette-bloom.name: Soft Vignette Bloom
soft-vignette-bloom.reason: Cinematic post-processing with multi-scale Gaussian bloom pyramid, anamorphic highlight streaks, and superellipse vignette. Features ACES tone mapping, split-tone shadows, film grain, and depth-driven haze. Bass boosts bloom threshold and mouse shifts vignette center.

solar-flare-cascade.name: Solar Flare Cascade
solar-flare-cascade.reason: Solar prominence and flare cascades erupting from a stellar limb. Bass drives flare intensity, mids create magnetic loop structures, treble adds coronal mass ejection particles. Mouse position shifts the stellar limb.

spatio-temporal-3d-conv.name: Spatio-Temporal 3D Convolution
spatio-temporal-3d-conv.reason: 3×3×T spatio-temporal convolution using the history ring buffer. A Gaussian spatial kernel is applied at each of T past frames and blended with temporal weights. Param 3 selects the operation mode: Temporal Noise Reduction (averages frames to kill flicker), Motion Blur (exponential frame accumulation), or Temporal Sharpening (subtracts the temporal mean to amplify transient changes).

spec-analytic-noise-flow.name: Analytic Noise Flow
spec-analytic-noise-flow.reason: Perlin noise with analytic derivatives for ultra-smooth flow fields. Gradient computed alongside noise value in single evaluation, eliminating finite-difference jitter for perfectly parallel streamlines.

spec-bicubic-crystal.name: Bicubic Crystal
spec-bicubic-crystal.reason: Bicubic Catmull-Rom crystalline distortion. Full 16-sample bicubic interpolation for perfectly smooth magnification, applied to prismatic crystalline faceting with chromatic separation.

spec-blackbody-thermal.name: Blackbody Thermal
spec-blackbody-thermal.reason: Maps image luminance to physically-correct blackbody radiation colors with audio-driven temperature modulation, chromatic temperature gradient, temporal ember persistence via dataTextureC, and HDR glow.

spec-blue-noise-stipple.name: Blue Noise Stipple
spec-blue-noise-stipple.reason: Blue-noise dithered pointillism rendering. Uses golden-ratio low-discrepancy sequences for perceptually optimal, uniformly-spaced dot distributions with smooth gradients and no aliasing.

spec-cooperative-edge-linking.name: Cooperative Edge Linking
spec-cooperative-edge-linking.reason: Workgroup-cooperative edge detection and chain tracing. Uses shared memory union-find to link connected edges within each tile, assigning unique edge IDs for downstream segmentation and flow effects.

spec-distance-field-text.name: Distance Field Text
spec-distance-field-text.reason: SDF-based procedural glyph overlay. Generates abstract runes and symbols as signed distance fields with infinitely smooth scaling, glowing edges, drop shadows, and chromatic cycling.

spec-histogram-equalize.name: Histogram Equalize
spec-histogram-equalize.reason: Real-time CLAHE histogram equalization using workgroup cooperative histogram building. Computes local histogram per 8x8 tile and remaps intensities via CDF for dramatic adaptive contrast enhancement.

spec-hypercube-projection.name: Hypercube Projection
spec-hypercube-projection.reason: Animated 4D tesseract projected into 2D using double rotation in XW and YZ planes. 32 edges are rendered with depth-based glow and input image texture-mapped onto faces.

spec-importance-sampled-bokeh.name: Importance Sampled Bokeh
spec-importance-sampled-bokeh.reason: Bokeh blur guided by image brightness using importance sampling. Bright pixels act as point light sources creating crisp bokeh highlights with smooth backgrounds via golden angle spiral distribution.

spec-iridescence-engine.name: Iridescence Engine
spec-iridescence-engine.reason: Thin-film interference simulation creating soap-bubble and oil-slick iridescence. Uses depth texture for film thickness and physically-correct optical path difference.

spec-prismatic-dispersion.name: Prismatic Dispersion
spec-prismatic-dispersion.reason: 4-band spectral dispersion through glass using Cauchy's equation. Treats RGBA as physical wavelengths with refractive index variation, reconstructing color via CIE color matching.

spec-quaternion-julia.name: Quaternion Julia
spec-quaternion-julia.reason: 4D quaternion Julia set raymarched in real-time. The 4th dimension animates over time creating organic morphing fractal forms with orbit-trap coloring and physically-based lighting.

spec-runge-kutta-advection.name: Runge-Kutta Advection
spec-runge-kutta-advection.reason: 4th-order Runge-Kutta fluid advection. Dramatically more accurate than Euler method, preserving fine dye structures 10x longer. Mouse creates counter-rotating vortex pairs.

spec-spherical-harmonics-light.name: Spherical Harmonics Light
spec-spherical-harmonics-light.reason: Spherical harmonics lighting derived from image content. Computes SH coefficients from local image samples and applies them to depth-derived normals for realistic ambient lighting.

spec-temporal-path-tracer.name: Temporal Path Tracer
spec-temporal-path-tracer.reason: 2D path tracer with temporal accumulation. Casts light rays that bounce off image edges, accumulating Monte Carlo samples over time for soft global illumination and color bleeding.

spectral-flow-sorting.name: Spectral Flow Sorting
spectral-flow-sorting.reason: Optical flow-based pixel sorting with spectral analysis. Pixels flow and sort along motion vectors.

spectral-flow-structure.name: Spectral Flow Structure
spectral-flow-structure.reason: Structure-tensor-guided pixel sorting with Line Integral Convolution. Eigenvectors from the structure tensor drive sort direction; coherency modulates blend strength. LIC adds flow-line texture. Audio-reactive with mouse vortices.

spectrogram-displace-pass1.name: Spectrogram Displace (Pass 1)
spectrogram-displace-pass1.reason: Spectrogram field generation: synthetic audio analysis, frequency bin calculation, perceptual color mapping, and displacement vector computation. Outputs spectrogram data to dataTextureA.

spectrogram-displace-pass2.name: Spectrogram Displace (Pass 2)
spectrogram-displace-pass2.reason: Image displacement and compositing pass: applies spectrogram-driven displacement to the input image, blends with spectrogram colors, applies frequency-based color grading and vignette, and reacts to bass audio input.

spore-galaxy.name: Spore Galaxy
spore-galaxy.reason: Organic spore particles disperse in galactic spiral arms with bass-driven arm swell and treble sparkle.

stellar-plasma-blackbody.name: Stellar Plasma Blackbody
stellar-plasma-blackbody.reason: Cosmic nebula domain-warped FBM blended with Planck's law blackbody thermal coloring. Energy intensity drives temperature mapping — cool voids glow ember-red, hot plasma cores burn blue-white with physically-correct radiance scaling.

supernova-core.name: Supernova Core
supernova-core.reason: Sedov-Taylor blast wave with radioactive decay luminosity (56Ni->56Co->56Fe). Rayleigh-Taylor instability fingers and neutrino-driven convection cells. Blackbody cooling sequence with iron emission lines and chromatic aberration. Audio drives shock expansion. Mouse creates asymmetric ejecta. Depth controls light echo perspective.

supernova-remnant.name: Supernova Remnant
supernova-remnant.reason: Expanding supernova shockwave with turbulent ejecta filaments. Bass drives the expansion front, mids create Rayleigh-Taylor instability fingers, treble adds radioactive decay sparkles. Mouse pulls the remnant center.

symbiotic-light-propagation-networks.name: Symbiotic Light Propagation Networks
symbiotic-light-propagation-networks.reason: Two organic species grow while transporting and transforming light through their network. They support each other symbiotically while competing for resources. Mouse seeds new growth while audio controls light color and transmission.

temporal-decay-multiresolution.name: Temporal Decay Multiresolution
temporal-decay-multiresolution.reason: Four-timescale temporal decomposition. R=fast (ages 1–2), G=medium (ages 4–5), B=slow (age 7), A=ultra-slow (full average). Per-channel independent decay rates create psychedelic rainbow splits where motion speed maps to color. Stacks cleanly behind sim-decay-system-rgba.

temporal-feedback-zoom-tracer.name: Temporal Feedback Zoom Tracer
temporal-feedback-zoom-tracer.reason: Reads the most recent history frame through a slight affine warp (zoom + rotation) then blends with the current frame. The compounding warp generates infinite self-generating psychedelic zoom tunnels from any video content.

temporal-frequency-decomposition.name: Temporal Frequency Decomposition
temporal-frequency-decomposition.reason: Discrete temporal Fourier analysis across the 8-frame history ring. Static pixels cancel to near-zero; pixels flickering or oscillating near the target frequency glow brightly. Reveals hidden temporal rhythms in video content.

temporal-halation-freeze.name: Temporal Halation Freeze
temporal-halation-freeze.reason: Long-exposure style halation and light bloom that slowly accumulates and 'freezes' bright moments with beautiful decaying ghost echoes. Transforms video into dreamy, time-blurred poetry. Bass lengthens the exposure tail.

temporal-layered-time-stamps.name: Temporal Layered Time-Stamps
temporal-layered-time-stamps.reason: Psychedelic temporal echo: blends 4–8 past frames from the history ring buffer (binding 13) with per-layer hue rotation and spiral UV distortion

temporal-phosphor-burn.name: Temporal Phosphor Burn
temporal-phosphor-burn.reason: CRT phosphor persistence: per-channel exponential decay (R=fast, B=slow) creates green/amber afterglow. max(current, decayed_history) luminance floor keeps bright pixels glowing long after the source moves on.

temporal-phosphor-burn-motion-adaptive.name: Temporal Phosphor Burn (Motion Adaptive)
temporal-phosphor-burn-motion-adaptive.reason: Motion-adaptive CRT phosphor burn. Fast-moving pixels get slow decay (long bright trails); still areas clear quickly. Green/amber warm tint follows the motion glow for vivid CRT ambiance.

temporal-rgb-ghost.name: Temporal RGB Ghost
temporal-rgb-ghost.reason: Per-channel temporal displacement: R=current, G=N frames ago, B=M frames ago. Moving objects leave vivid rainbow comet tails as each color channel trails a different distance behind. Static areas appear normal.

temporal-slit-scan.name: Temporal Slit Scan
temporal-slit-scan.reason: Classic slit-scan time-smear: each column (or row) samples a different point in the 8-frame history ring. One edge shows the current frame, the opposite edge shows 7 frames ago. Creates the flowing painterly time-smear of Radiohead's Street Spirit video on any motion.

tensor-flow-morphological.name: Tensor Flow Morphological
tensor-flow-morphological.reason: Depth-aware tensor eigenwarp with morphological post-processing. Erosion darkens compressed tensor regions, dilation brightens tensile regions. Gradient highlights edges created by tensor warping.

texture.name: Procedural Texture Analyzer
texture.reason: Multi-scale texture analyzer with Laplacian edge enhancement, unsharp mask, temporal smoothing, golden-ratio vignette, and audio-reactive sparkle/glitch.

thermal-touch-blackbody.name: Thermal Touch Blackbody
thermal-touch-blackbody.reason: Mouse-driven thermal camera with blackbody radiation coloring. The cursor acts as a localized heat source and image brightness maps to physically-correct temperature via Planck's law.

thermal-vision-blackbody.name: Thermal Vision Blackbody
thermal-vision-blackbody.reason: Physically-correct thermal vision camera using blackbody radiation via Planck's law. Image luminance maps to real temperature colors, with mouse acting as a localized heat source and configurable sensor contrast.

tone-histogram.name: Tone Histogram v2
tone-histogram.reason: Single-pass local adaptive histogram equalization with film-like tonal curves, split-tone shadows/highlights, grain texture, and depth-driven haze removal. Bass stretches histogram dynamically.

tone-histogram-apply.name: Tone Histogram (Pass 2: Apply)
tone-histogram-apply.reason: Reads histogram buckets, computes auto-exposure and tone curve, and applies histogram-driven grading.

topological-acoustic-knots.name: Topological Acoustic Knots
topological-acoustic-knots.reason: Nematic Q-tensor evolution with topological charge computation and trefoil-knot SDF constraint. Schlieren texture with defect-core coloring and HDR bloom on +1 defects. Bass creates defect pairs via Kibble-Zurek quench, mids drive annihilation dynamics, treble adds acoustic phonon waves. Mouse pins director with homeotropic anchoring. Ripples spawn defect loops.

tornado-vortex.name: Tornado Vortex
tornado-vortex.reason: Rankine vortex model with viscous core, radial inflow, and vertical updraft. Lagrangian debris advection with condensation funnel and subsurface scattering. Lightning flash illumination. Audio drives Fujita-scale intensity. Mouse acts as a probe flung by vorticity. Depth controls debris perspective.

velvet-scatter-bloom.name: Velvet Scatter Bloom
velvet-scatter-bloom.reason: Rich velvet-like subsurface scattering on darker regions of the input, with living audio-reactive bloom and a moving mouse light that reveals hidden color beneath the surface. Feels luxurious and organic on both stills and video.

vhs-chroma-bleed.name: VHS Chroma Bleed
vhs-chroma-bleed.reason: VHS tape aesthetic with audio-reactive jitter: bass drives line dropouts, treble adds micro-glitch. Chromatic bleed with depth-scatter. RGB channels shift independently for analog decay.

vhs-tracking-bilateral.name: VHS Tracking Bilateral
vhs-tracking-bilateral.reason: Full VHS signal chain physics with edge-preserving bilateral smoothing. Timebase jitter, chroma noise, and control track dropouts are filtered through a bilateral dream, creating a soft analog degradation while preserving edges.

vortex-pass1.name: Clean Vortex (Pass 1)
vortex-pass1.reason: Vortex dynamics pass: four animated vortex centers, Biot-Savart velocity field, vorticity confinement, and turbulent FBM noise. Outputs velocity and vorticity field to dataTextureA.

vortex-pass2.name: Clean Vortex (Pass 2)
vortex-pass2.reason: Fluid vortex distortion rendering pass with chromatic velocity blur offsets, temporal vorticity accumulation, audio-driven swirl intensity, iridescent tint based on curl, and palette grading.

watercolor-bloom.name: Watercolor Bloom
watercolor-bloom.reason: Soft feathered watercolor bloom with paper fibre texture, wet-edge darkening, and audio-reactive radius expansion. Temporal feedback lets wet paint slowly dry.

wave-equation-rgba-fluid.name: Wave Equation RGBA Fluid
wave-equation-rgba-fluid.reason: Coupled wave equation and incompressible fluid simulation packed into RGBA32FLOAT. Wave height and velocity drive fluid motion while fluid pressure dampens waves. Dye advection visualizes the combined flow field with rainbow phase coloring.

wolfram-data-demo.name: Wolfram Data Demo
wolfram-data-demo.reason: Demonstrates scientific constants and mathematical functions from Wolfram Alpha. Features phyllotaxis patterns, Airy disk diffraction, Fibonacci spirals, and atmospheric scattering using real physical data.

zoom-burst.name: Zoom Burst
zoom-burst.reason: Exponential zoom burst with radial motion blur, angular streak sampling, starburst light rays, chromatic radial dispersion, HDR bloom, film grain, and ACES tone mapping. Bass accelerates the burst; mouse positions the center; depth controls streak perspective.
